text: Globe spins to Africa, zooms to Tanzania's forested coast and mountains.
original_texts: A rotating globe appears, centered on Africa.
The globe zooms into the coastline of Tanzania.
The view settles on a forested coastline and mountains.

text: Sunlit forest.
original_texts: The scene opens with a view of a lush green forest, sunlight filtering through the leaves.  Dust motes dance in the sunbeams.

text:
GOMBE NATIONAL PARK
TANZANIA
Sunlight filters through the leaves of a lush green forest, illuminating a mossy rock and small plants. Dust motes dance in the sunbeams.

With words and narration by
Jane Goodall

A large, lush tree dominates the foreground, its branches reaching skyward. The surrounding forest is dense and verdant. Sunlight filters through the leaves, creating a dappled pattern of light and shadow on the forest floor.
A shallow stream flows through a lush, green forest. The stream bed is rocky, and the water is clear. Sunlight filters through the trees, illuminating the scene.
A black and white butterfly rests on the forest floor.
The camera focuses on the fallen leaves and twigs on the ground.
Close-up of a dark red plant with delicate, glistening spiderwebs draped over it. The background is a soft focus of green foliage.
Vines and leaves surround the plant.
The scene opens looking up through the branches of a lush green tree, the sun peeking through the leaves.
A gentle breeze rustles the leaves.
The scene continues from the previous scene, showing a view looking up through the branches of a lush green tree. Sunlight filters through the leaves.
Back to Map
© 2014 Google, Terms, Privacy, new google.com, Report problem
The view transitions from the tree canopy to a wide shot of a forested valley. A mountain ridge is visible in the background.
Close-up view of leaves and branches.
Small insects fly in the background.
The background is blurred, suggesting a focus on the leaves and branches in the foreground.
Green trees, pale sky. Chimpanzee appears, leaps to another branch.
original_texts: View of lush green trees against a pale sky.
A chimpanzee appears at the top of the trees.
The chimpanzee leaps to a different branch.

text: Chimpanzee in a leafy green tree swats and eats bugs.
original_texts: A chimpanzee sits atop a lush green tree against a pale sky. Numerous small insects fly around it.
The chimpanzee swipes at the insects with its hand, trying to catch them.
The chimpanzee continues to swipe and catch insects, occasionally bringing its hand to its mouth as if eating them.

text: A chimpanzee rests in a tree, its mouth slightly open.  Insects buzz around it.
A chimpanzee grooms a younger chimpanzee on the forest floor.
Chimpanzee in leafy tree.
original_texts: A chimpanzee clings to a tree in a lush forest, partially obscured by foliage. A small stream is visible in the background.

text: Two baboons walk through the forest, one after the other.
original_texts: A baboon walks through the forest.
Another baboon walks behind the first baboon.

text: View looking up the trunk of a large tree.
Sunlight shines through the branches.
Close-up of a yellow grasshopper resting on a dried leaf at the base of a tree.
The grasshopper remains still.
A vibrant green snake crawls slowly along a mossy tree branch.
Waterfall mist, clinging green.
original_texts: Water cascades down a rocky waterfall, creating a mist.
Green foliage clings to the wet rocks.

text: A waterfall cascades down rocks, creating mist at the bottom.
Two butterflies with black, white, and orange markings flutter around green foliage.
A third butterfly briefly enters the frame.

A wide shot reveals a tranquil landscape, featuring a vast body of water, possibly an ocean or a large lake, spanning the horizon. The water's surface glistens under the sunlight. In the foreground, golden-brown grass covers the gently sloping terrain. Scattered trees and shrubs dot the landscape, adding depth to the scenery.

A bird soars gracefully in the sky, adding a touch of life to the serene atmosphere. The coastline, visible in the distance, extends along the edge of the water, creating a picturesque boundary between land and sea.
Back to Map

The scene opens with a view of intertwined tree branches against a backdrop of green foliage and a clear sky. The trees have reddish-brown bark with patches of lighter, possibly moss or lichen, growth. Dry grass is visible in the foreground, covering the ground below the trees. The trees are densely packed together, creating a canopy.
A chimpanzee hangs from a tree branch, partially obscured by leaves. Its fur is dark, almost black, and its face is light brown with prominent dark eyes.  It looks around curiously.
The chimpanzee brings a hand up to its mouth.
The chimpanzee continues to observe its surroundings from its position in the tree.
Two baboons are grooming each other.
One baboon meticulously picks through the fur of another.
A white insect with spiky protrusions rests on a green leaf.
A monkey swings through palm trees.
Dark, choppy water fills the frame.
The view expands to show a stormy sky over the lake.
Blue coast, mountains.
original_texts: Aerial view of a coastline with blue water and green, mountainous terrain.

text: Back to Map

Sunlit woods.
original_texts: The view transitions from an aerial perspective to ground level within a lush, sunlit forest.

text: Hello Gombe.
Hello world.
The view from the previous scene continues, showcasing the lush, sunlit forest floor.
The scene ends.
